today.mood: Cooling night vibes, perfect for mamak runs and late dinner
today.best_time_to_go_out: Now until midnight — weather's cooling down, humidity dropped nicely
today.summary: Clear skies, few clouds, 30°C feels like 31°C. Humidity at 50% which is quite comfortable for KL standards. Light breeze from the west. Good evening to lepak outdoor or hit up street food spots.

weather.advisory: Comfortable night ahead — humidity lower than usual. Good for outdoor dining or evening walks around KLCC park.

finance.plain_english: USD at RM 3.97, no major shift. Bitcoin holding at $72k. RON95 unchanged at RM 2.05 — your petrol budget stays the same. Gold data MIA today, but doesn't affect your nasi lemak price anyway.

food.name: Jalan Alor Night Market
food.vibe: Classic KL street food strip — BBQ seafood, hokkien mee, satay, lok lok
food.why_now: Peak hour right now, all stalls firing. Perfect weather to sit outdoor and feast.

food.name: Village Park Restaurant
food.vibe: Famous nasi lemak, open late, always packed
food.why_now: Less queue around this hour compared to lunch. Their fried chicken hits different at night.

food.name: Pelita Nasi Kandar
food.vibe: 24-hour mamak institution — roti canai, nasi kandar, teh tarik
food.why_now: Open all night. Post-dinner supper or late mamak session with friends.

food.name: Taman Connaught Night Market
food.vibe: One of KL's longest pasar malam — food, clothes, random finds
food.why_now: Wednesday night market. Good weather means comfortable browsing and eating.

food.name: Hoppers
food.vibe: Sri Lankan street food — hoppers, kottu, string hoppers
food.why_now: Open until 11 PM. Different vibe if you want something other than usual mamak.

wellness.name: Thai Odyssey
wellness.vibe: Affordable Thai massage chain, walk-ins welcome
wellness.why_now: Late slots usually available. Post-dinner massage to unwind.

wellness.name: Hammam Spa
wellness.why_now: Last bookings around now. Treat yourself after a long day.

events.title: KL Tower Mini Zoo Night Visit
events.worth_it: Less crowded at night, cooler temps, kids enjoy the animals and aquarium

events.title: Pavilion KL Late Night Shopping
events.worth_it: AC comfort, dining options, less crowds after 9 PM

events.title: KLCC Park Evening Fountain Show
events.worth_it: Nice weather tonight, Petronas Towers backdrop, free entertainment

events.title: Reggae Bar Live Music Night
events.worth_it: Popular spot but verify schedule on their socials

events.title: Taps Beer Bar Trivia Night
events.worth_it: Fun group activity but confirm date on their TikTok first

news.title: MRT Kajang Line Full Operations
news.plain_english: All MRT lines running smoothly tonight. No delays reported. Good time to use public transport into the city.

news.title: RON95 Petrol Price Unchanged
news.plain_english: RON95 stays at RM 2.05/L. Your fuel budget remains the same this week.

transit.verdict: Go for it — reliable way to Bukit Bintang, KLCC, Cheras tonight
Solid option for Pavilion, Mid Valley, Bangsar areas
Post-dinner time so moderate demand. Should get rides easily. Expect RM 15–30 for most central KL trips.

hike.why_tonight: Not recommended — trails close at 6 PM. Save for morning.
Popular for sunrise hikes. Not advisable at night for safety reasons.

escape.vibe: Cool weather, casino, theme park, late-night dining
escape.why_tonight: Resorts World open late. Escape KL heat for 18°C temps. SkyAvenue shopping/dining until midnight.
escape.transport: Drive or Genting bus from TBS/Pavilion

escape.why_tonight: Too late for tonight — better as morning/afternoon trip. Save for weekend.
Beach better enjoyed in daylight. Consider for tomorrow instead.
